# veeam_configuration_backup (Resource)

Manages Veeam configuration backup settings and can trigger a configuration backup.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean)

### Optional

- `encryption_enabled` (Boolean)
- `encryption_password_id` (String)
- `repository_id` (String)
- `restore_points_to_keep` (Number)
- `trigger_on_apply` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `last_session_id` (String)
- `last_session_result` (String)
- `last_session_state` (String)
